# ferriskey_organization (Resource)

Manages an organization (multi-tenancy unit) within a FerrisKey realm.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ferriskey_organization" "tenant" {
  realm       = "acme"
  name        = "Globex"
  alias       = "globex"
  description = "Globex Corporation tenant"
  domain      = "globex.example"
  enabled     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alias` (String) Stable, URL-safe identifier used for lookups and routing within the realm.
- `name` (String) Human-readable organization name.
- `realm` (String) Name of the realm the organization belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Organization description.
- `domain` (String) Associated email/identity domain.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the organization is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `redirect_url` (String) Redirect URL associated with the organization.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier `{realm}/{uuid}`.
- `organization_uuid` (String) Server-assigned UUID of the organization.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import ferriskey_organization.tenant acme/7c3e9a14-1111-2222-3333-444455556666
```
